examDate.label: IELTS exam date
examDate.unsetHint: Pick a date to unlock a countdown, intensity phases, and a weekly time-budget projection.
examDate.studyHoursProjection: About {hours}h of practice ahead at {min} min/week.

phase.foundationCopy: Plenty of time. Build vocabulary and a steady daily habit.
phase.buildCopy: Practice all four skills weekly. Track your weak areas.
phase.sharpenCopy: Run a mock test every two weeks. Drill weak skills.
phase.finalCopy: Daily mock conditions. Time management. Light vocab review.
phase.examWeekCopy: Light review only. Sleep well. Trust your prep.
phase.pastCopy: This date has passed — pick a new one above.

practice.topicsHint: Up to 5 topics. The AI tailors vocab and writing prompts to these.
practice.topicsFull: 5 topics maximum — remove one to add another.
practice.dailyTimeHint: Telegram bot will DM you at this time ({tz}).
practice.groupsLinkDescription: View settings for groups you're a member of.

groups.heading: Your groups
groups.subheading: Manage settings for IELTS groups you're a member of.

empty.heading: No groups yet
empty.description: Join a group via Telegram and link your account to manage it from the web.

emptyLinked.heading: You're not in any group yet
emptyLinked.description: Add the bot to a Telegram group and run /start there. The group will show up here automatically.

owner.title: You're the group owner
owner.description: You can edit any setting below. Members see this group as read-only.

member.title: View-only — you're a member
member.description: Only the group owner can change these settings. You can still see what's configured.

groups.readonlyBanner: Only the group owner can edit settings.

plan.heading: Your plan
plan.subtitle: Manage your subscription and AI usage.

privacy.deferNote: Data export and account deletion are coming soon. Contact support if you need them today.
